chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-954 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 22.12.2025 M/s Ali Gul Abbasi and Zohaib Azam, Advocate for petitioners Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Advocate General ***************** The main grievance raised by the petitioners is that they are not being provided with adequate and proper water for the irrigation of their agricultural lands, despite being entitled to the same under the applicable law, rules, and the notified irrigation schedule. It is contended that due to the insufficient and irregular supply of water, the petitioners are suffering continuous loss and hardship, thereby adversely affecting their agricultural activities and means of livelihood. In the above circumstances, the respondents, particularly those belonging to the Irrigation Department and SIDA, are hereby directed to make sincere, diligent, and effective efforts to ensure the provision of water to the petitioners for the purpose of irrigating their lands, strictly in accordance with the relevant law, rules, policies, and the notified irrigation rotation and distribution system. The respondents shall further ensure that no discrimination, arbitrariness, or unlawful obstruction is caused in the supply of water, and that the petitioners are treated at par with other similarly placed landholders. With these observations and directions, the instant petition stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E J U D G E M.Ali*
